title: Dinners Revamped
description: This project adds new food items and much more food related things!
body:
# What this mod adds to the game

This mod adds **15** Extra salted food:

- Salted Tropical fish
- Salted Steak
- Salted Baked potato
- Salted Beetroot soup
- Salted Coocked chicken ( Not 3d yet)
- Salted Coocked Cod
- Salted Coocked mutton ( Not 3d yet)
- Salted Coocked porkchop
- Saled coocked rabit ( Not 3d yet)
- Salted coocked Salmon
- Salted Mushroom stew
- Salted Rabit stew
- Salted Golden apple
- Salted enchanted golden apple

- And ofc Salt to Saltize The Foods above

- One item that is also added is Sushi!

## It also adds 2 new blocks:

- Saltizer block ( Used to salt all the items from above)
- Salt Block ( Drops salt to create the salted foods)

##  There is also an new villager proffesion called the cheff with the next trades:

### Noivice trades:

 - 2 emeralds =  5 Salt
 - Raw rabbit + emerald = 10 coocked salted rabit
 - Potato + emerald = 10 coocked Baked potatoes

###  Apprentice:

 - Cod + emerald = 3 Salted Coocked cod
 - Salmon + emerald = 3 Salted Coocked Salmon
 - Tropical fish + emerald= 3 Salted Tropical fish

### journeyman:

  - Raw chicken + emerald = 5 Salted Coocked Chicken
  - Raw mutton + emeral = 5 Salted Coocked Mutton
  - Raw porckchop + emerald = 5 Salted Coocked Pockchop

### Expert:

  - Empty bowl + emerald = 2 Salted Rabit stew
  - Empty bowl + emerald = 2 Salted mushroom stew
  - Empty bowl + emerald = 2 Salted beetrout soup

### Master:

  - Raw beef + Emerald = 5 Salted Coocked Steak
  - Golden carrot + emerald = 4 Salted golden apple
  - Enchanted golden apple + emerald= 1 Salted Enchanted Golden apple


## There are Also 3 new advancements!

- Salted and Loaded ( Place your first Saltizer block!)
- Over Powerd ( Create or buy your first Salted golden apple)
- Over-over powerd ( Create or buy your First Salted enchanted golden apple )


## Why did I create this mod?

I created it because in chemestry I learned about salt and I was wondering if It would be cool to have an mod about salted items!

 
_Sidenote all my mods are incompatable with eachother for some reason :sob:._
